levelup_categories.label: Self-Care
wins: Brushed my teeth the full two minutes
Got ready without being reminded
Laid out my clothes the night before

levelup_categories.label: Cleaning & Organization
wins: Made my bed a little neater
Put my clothes away instead of on the chair
Tidied one extra spot without being asked

wins: Moved my body 5 minutes longer
Chose water instead of juice
Did a quick stretch before bed

levelup_categories.label: Education & Learning
wins: Read a few minutes longer than usual
Checked my own work before saying I was done
Tried the tricky part before asking for help

levelup_categories.label: Goal Setting
wins: Picked one small goal for the day
Broke a big job into smaller steps
Finished what I started before moving on

levelup_categories.label: Charity & Giving Back
wins: Helped someone without being asked
Said something kind on purpose
Set aside something to give

levelup_categories.label: Fun
